summary: Iter 2 full regression for 4 new features (SSE streaming, PDF export, TTS, Whisper STT, webcam recording). 6/6 new backend pytest cases pass and full frontend E2E (login → new interview → SSE streaming → voice/webcam toggles → finish → report → PDF download → TTS play) succeeds. No console/page errors during streaming.

test_results_detail.sse_streaming: PASS — GET /api/interviews/:id/stream returned text/event-stream with multiple `event: delta` frames and exactly one `event: done` frame; done payload had assistant.content + completed:bool.
test_results_detail.pdf_export: PASS — GET /api/interviews/:id/report/pdf returned application/pdf with Content-Disposition attachment; bytes start with %PDF- and size > 1000.
test_results_detail.tts: PASS — POST /api/tts returned 200 audio/mpeg (budget apparently NOT exhausted for OpenAI TTS at test time).
test_results_detail.audio_transcription: PASS — POST /api/interviews/:id/message/audio with empty file returned 400 'Empty audio' as expected; tiny junk bytes returned 400/402/502 (no 500 crash).
test_results_detail.webcam_upload: PASS — POST /api/interviews/:id/recording returned {ok:true, recording:{presence_pct:80, speaking_pct:60, engagement_score:70,...}} and interview doc contains recording object with engagement_score.
test_results_detail.webcam_download: PASS — GET /api/interviews/:id/recording returned original bytes with video content type.
test_results_detail.frontend_interview_page: PASS — testids voice-mode-toggle, tts-toggle, webcam-toggle, finish-interview-btn, composer, answer-input, send-btn all present. Sending a message shows streaming-message element then final assistant reply. No console errors.
test_results_detail.frontend_voice_mode: PASS — clicking voice-mode-toggle mounts voice-composer with start-recording-btn.
test_results_detail.frontend_webcam_toggle: PASS — clicking webcam-toggle renders webcam-column + webcam-panel.
test_results_detail.frontend_report_pdf_tts: PASS — download-pdf-btn triggers /report/pdf 200 application/pdf; speak-summary-btn triggers /api/tts 200.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1000 lines. Split into routers (auth, interviews, voice, recording, reports) — becoming a maintenance risk.

llm_stream error signalling uses in-band sentinel strings '[[ERROR:...]]' which the SSE endpoint sniffs via startswith. Prefer yielding a typed tuple/dict so we can't accidentally leak the sentinel into a delta frame if a model literally outputs '[[ERROR:...]]'.
POST /tts uses `payload: dict` — swap to a Pydantic model for consistent validation and OpenAPI docs.

Object-storage init still uses a module-global _storage_key; not concurrency-safe on cold start (multiple concurrent requests could double-init). Wrap in an asyncio.Lock or initialise on startup only.
transcribe_and_reply re-uses send_message() which duplicates the reply pipeline; consider extracting the shared reply-composition into a helper.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test interviews under demo user (Staff Engineer at Stripe iter2 tests + Tiny audio test + one via UI). No cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter2 features working. Note: OpenAI TTS returned 200 during this run (Emergent LLM key budget may have been topped up). Whisper STT was not exercised with real audio (per instructions). SSE frames correctly parsed via requests.iter_lines. Recording bytes are stored via Emergent Object Storage.
